title: PS-29-3
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Otheruses|Hammer}} {{Nickname}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:PS-293-Hammer.jpg]] |name=PS-29-3
"Hammer" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender= |pronouns=He/him{{JKTCG|set=Premiere|cardname=Shadow Three|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/73022/cid/5265261/2001-Decipher-Jedi-Knights-TCG:-Premiere-154-Shadow-Three?PageIndex=3}} |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]{{JKTCG|set=Premiere|cardname=PS-29-3 • "Hammer"|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/73022/cid/5265140/2001-Decipher-Jedi-Knights-TCG:-Premiere-62-PS-29-3---}} **[[Shadow wing]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''PS-29-3''', also known as "'''Hammer'''," was a [[TIE pilot]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. PS-29-3 flew under the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] [[Shadow Three (Shadow wing)|Shadow Three]]{{CSWECite|III|48|PS-29-3}} in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Shadow wing]]. He recorded the highest score in [[Imperial Academy/Legends|academy]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] simulator drills, a fact that caught [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Conan Antonio Motti's]] attention. PS-29-3's [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] had a command system capable of coordinating the combined power of the entire Shadow [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing]]. He wore a [[Color/Legends|black]] TIE pilot [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]] and [[Armor/Legends|helmet]], and had designs on being the leading [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of Shadow wing. ==Behind the scenes== PS-29-3 was created for a card in the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'', with his name simultaneously being used in the gameplay text of a second card in the set. ==Sources== {{CardGameSet|set={{JKTCG|set=Premiere|parent=1}} {{1stm}}|cards= *{{JKTCG|set=Premiere|cardname=PS-29-3 • "Hammer"|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/73022/cid/5265140/2001-Decipher-Jedi-Knights-TCG:-Premiere-62-PS-29-3---}} *{{JKTCG|set=Premiere|cardname=Shadow Three|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/73022/cid/5265261/2001-Decipher-Jedi-Knights-TCG:-Premiere-154-Shadow-Three?PageIndex=3}} {{C|Gameplay text only}} }} *{{JKTCG|set=Scum and Villainy|cardname=Shadow Three|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/108877/cid/7533310/2001-Decipher-Jedi-Knights-TCG:-Scum-and-Villainy-140-Shadow-Three?PageIndex=2}} {{C|Gameplay text only}} *{{JKTCG|set=Masters of the Force|cardname=Shadow Three|link=https://www.tcdb.com/ViewCard.cfm/sid/108822/cid/7529710/2001-Decipher-Jedi-Knights-TCG:-Masters-of-The-Force-84-Shadow-Three?PageIndex=2}} {{C|Gameplay text only}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Imperial Navy pilots of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified gender]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Individuals with he/him pronouns]]
